head.title: AERIS-10P Power Distribution Board
head.description: Power board: 24V input, LT8612 (5V/5A), LT8607 (3.3V/3A), TPS65133 (+-5V/1A), LM7812 (12V/1A). AERIS-10P Rev 1.0
head.comments: Import into EasyEDA Standard via File > Import > EasyEDA JSON

shape: T‾L‾120‾185‾0‾0.85‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 120 185‾DESIGN: 2-layer FR4, 2oz copper, 2mm traces for 5A paths, ceramic caps for RF ripple‾#880000‾
T‾L‾120‾245‾0‾0.9‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 120 245‾J1: XT60 Male connector (24V DC input from battery or AC/DC adapter)‾#880000‾
T‾L‾130‾310‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 130 310‾F1: Automotive blade fuse 8A (inline on +24V line)‾#880000‾
T‾L‾130‾325‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 130 325‾D1: SS36 Schottky diode (reverse polarity protection, 3A, 60V)‾#880000‾
T‾L‾130‾505‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 130 505‾FB (Pin 6): feedback, set with R1=100k / R2=22.1k‾#008800‾
T‾L‾130‾520‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 130 520‾GND (PGND, AGND): star ground to input cap‾#008800‾
T‾L‾130‾535‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 130 535‾EN (Pin 7): pull to VIN for always-on, or MCU control‾#008800‾
T‾L‾130‾610‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 130 610‾Output: J2 Pin1/2 to Main Board 5V rail‾#008800‾
T‾L‾630‾580‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 630 580‾Output: J2 Pin3 to Main Board 3.3V rail‾#008800‾
T‾L‾130‾715‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 130 715‾VOUT1 (Pin 7): +5V rail for RF circuit biasing‾#004488‾
T‾L‾130‾730‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 130 730‾VOUT2 (Pin 14): -5V rail for gate bias circuits‾#004488‾
T‾L‾130‾835‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 130 835‾Used for: HMC647A supply, LNA gate bias‾#004488‾
T‾L‾620‾660‾0‾1‾‾3‾‾middle-left‾M 620 660‾U4: LM7812 + LDO Adjust (12V / 1A for PA drain)‾#884400‾
T‾L‾630‾730‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 630 730‾LM7812 can do 1.5A continuous; heatsink required‾#884400‾
T‾L‾630‾805‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 630 805‾Output: J2 Pin6 to Main Board (and to RF board PA)‾#884400‾
T‾L‾130‾935‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 130 935‾  Pin 1: +5V (3A, power MCU, RPi5, logic)‾#333333‾
T‾L‾130‾980‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 130 980‾  Pin 4: GND (return for all rails)‾#333333‾
T‾L‾130‾1010‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 130 1010‾  Pin 6: +12V (0.5A, PA drain bias via main board)‾#333333‾
T‾L‾130‾1040‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 130 1040‾  Pin1: +5V PA, Pin2: +5V RF, Pin3: +3.3V, Pin4-5: +5V/-5V RF bias, Pin6: GND, Pin7-8: GND‾#333333‾
T‾L‾120‾1200‾0‾0.85‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 120 1200‾EFFICIENCY: Total board efficiency ‾85% at full load (5W out from 24V supply at 250mA = 6W in -> 83%)‾#555555‾
T‾L‾120‾1215‾0‾0.85‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 120 1215‾THERMAL: LM7812 heatsink required (P_diss = (24-12) x 1A = 12W!). Use TO-220 + 10C/W heatsink.‾#880000‾
T‾L‾120‾1230‾0‾0.85‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 120 1230‾ALTERNATIVE: Replace LM7812 with LT8612 variant for 12V (reduces heat from 12W to ‾1W)‾#006600‾
T‾L‾120‾1380‾0‾0.85‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 120 1380‾NOTE: 2-layer FR4, 2oz copper. Use 2mm traces for all 5A paths. Star-ground topology. Import to EasyEDA then route.‾#006600‾
